CustomField.description: Summary of Flow work item execution status with executed/failure counts.
CustomField.formula: IF(TotalFlowsPlanned__c = 0, "", IF(TotalFlowsPlanned__c = TotalFlowsProcessed__c && TotalFlowsExecuted__c = TotalFlowsProcessed__c, "✅ " & TEXT(TotalFlowsExecuted__c) & " executed", IF(TotalFlowsProcessed__c > 0 && TotalFlowsExecuted__c = 0, "❌ " & TEXT(TotalFlowsProcessed__c) & " failed", IF(TotalFlowsProcessed__c = 0, "⏸️ " & TEXT(TotalFlowsPlanned__c) & " planned, not executed", "⚠️ " & TEXT(TotalFlowsExecuted__c) & "/" & TEXT(TotalFlowsPlanned__c) & " executed" & IF(TotalFlowsProcessed__c - TotalFlowsExecuted__c > 0, " (" & TEXT(TotalFlowsProcessed__c - TotalFlowsExecuted__c) & " failed" & IF(TotalFlowsPlanned__c - TotalFlowsProcessed__c > 0, ", " & TEXT(TotalFlowsPlanned__c - TotalFlowsProcessed__c) & " not executed)", ")" ), IF(TotalFlowsPlanned__c - TotalFlowsProcessed__c > 0, " (" & TEXT(TotalFlowsPlanned__c - TotalFlowsProcessed__c) & " not executed)", "" ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Summary of Flow work item execution status.
CustomField.label: Flow Summary
